name: General Tso's Chicken Twwr12a
recipeInstructions:
To make the sauce, mix cornstarch and water together. Add minced garlic, ginger, sugar, dark soy sauce, vinegar, cooking sherry, and hot chicken broth. Then add MSG and stir until the sugar dissolves. Refrigerate until ready to use.
In a separate bowl, mix chicken pieces with dark soy sauce and pepper. Stir in an egg. Gradually add cornstarch until the chicken is evenly coated. Heat oil in a wok until just hot, then add chicken pieces and stir-fry until crispy and light brown. Do not overcook; watch the temperature to prevent the meat from becoming tough. Drain on paper towels.
Add onions and peppers to the hot wok and stir-fry briefly. Pour in the sauce mixture and stir constantly. If needed, add more water or cornstarch to adjust consistency. This recipe serves 6-8 people and is best served with white steamed rice.
